title: Place
description: A complete place representation from the Places API (New)

name.description: The resource name of this place in the format places/{placeId}.

types.description: A set of type tags for this place. Full list at https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-types

primaryType.description: The primary type of this place

nationalPhoneNumber.description: The place's phone number in national format

internationalPhoneNumber.description: The place's phone number in international format

formattedAddress.description: The full human-readable address for this place

shortFormattedAddress.description: A short human-readable address for this place

addressComponents.description: The individual address components of the place

rating.description: The place's rating on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0

userRatingCount.description: The total number of user ratings

googleMapsUri.description: A URL to the place's page on Google Maps

priceLevel.description: The price level of the place

businessStatus.description: The business status of the place

utcOffsetMinutes.description: Number of minutes this place's current timezone is offset from UTC

reviews.description: Up to 5 reviews for this place

adrFormatAddress.description: The place's address in adr microformat

iconMaskBaseUri.description: A URL for an SVG icon mask

iconBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the icon in hex format

curbsidePickup.description: Whether the place supports curbside pickup
